mapper.select: SELECT * FROM academic_week WHERE semester_id = #{semesterId} AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY week_number
SELECT * FROM academic_week WHERE #{date} BETWEEN start_date AND end_date AND deleted = 0 LIMIT 1
SELECT * FROM academic_week WHERE is_current = 1 AND deleted = 0 LIMIT 1
mapper.update: UPDATE academic_week SET is_current = 0 WHERE is_current = 1 AND deleted = 0
